hero.name: Abdullah Hosny
hero.bio: I build fast, accessible, and visually refined web experiences using React.js and Next.js.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Crafting digital experiences with code
about.para1: I'm Abdullah Hosny, a frontend developer with a passion for building polished, performant, and accessible web applications. I specialize in React.js and Next.js, turning complex ideas into elegant digital products.
about.para2: With hands-on experience across e-commerce, dashboards, landing pages, and SaaS products, I bring both technical depth and design sensitivity to every project I work on.

points: Engineered WikiFood — a full-scale multi-vendor food e-commerce platform with multi-supplier catalog, real-time cart, checkout, and end-to-end order lifecycle tracking.
Built PrintOut — a scalable print marketplace with Google Drive upload, custom print configuration, and full admin order management.

Architected reusable component libraries in React.js and Next.js; integrated REST APIs powering complex marketplace workflows; optimized performance via code splitting, lazy loading, and Redux state management.
Built "New Vision" — a multi-tenant operations dashboard enabling businesses to manage users, employees, and customers across multiple independent entities from a single interface.
Designed customizable, role-based admin features and delivered scalable solutions using Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, and React Query.
Developed "Front Door" and "Driver Admin" — logistics UIs for FMCG supply chain with responsive, accessible Next.js and Ant Design interfaces.
Delivered production-quality code in a cross-functional team environment.
